name: Tuna Delight
recipeIngredient: 1 hard-boiled egg, thinly sliced per person
1/2 can (6 1/2 oz.) tuna, drained and flaked per person
4 black olives, pitted and cut into 4 pieces per person
Equal parts mayonnaise and sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the tuna, black olives, onion, and sliced hard-boiled eggs.
2. Add equal parts mayonnaise and sour cream to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Mix in the lemon juice.
4. Sprinkle chopped parsley over the mixture, if using.
5. In a separate bowl, sprinkle the gelatin over water and let it soak for about 5 minutes or until it expands.
6. Add toasted almonds to the gelatin mixture and stir until well combined.
7. Stir the gelatin mixture into the tuna salad until fully incorporated.
8. Portion the mixture into molds or serve directly from the bowl and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Using hands for mixing and adding eggs last to keep them intact, mix the first six ingredients together.
